category_title: Dominant students with high levels of physical and verbal aggression
scenario_title: Reactive aggression to teacher direction during science group work
minimal_context: The student is working in a collaborative science group looking at photos to discuss animal needs and emotions.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please look at the photos of the animals with your group and discuss what you think they are feeling.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I am not doing anything. I don't have to respect you.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to do the work with your group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: He told me something! I'm going to hit him hard!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Stop that right now and get back to your seat.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I am getting out of control! (Gets mad and throws his school bag away)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please look at the photos of the animals with your group and discuss what you think they are feeling.

STUDENT: I am not doing anything. I don't have to respect you.

TUTOR: You need to do the work with your group.

STUDENT: He told me something! I'm going to hit him hard!

TUTOR: Stop that right now and get back to your seat.

STUDENT: I am getting out of control! (Gets mad and throws his school bag away)

task.content: discuss their opinions, experiences and understanding of the topic and issue under study
task.learning_goal: gaining an understanding of their needs, emotions, capacities, current situations and their similarities with humans

context.materials: photos, documentaries, videos, readings from science textbooks, newspaper, short articles, storytelling

challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: got mad, get out of control
related_quotes: sometimes I still get out of control, like the other day the teacher told me something and I got mad and threw my school bag away.
before someone told me something and I started to hit him hard and got crazy.

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: started behaving very bad, I did not do anything and did not respect you [the teacher/researcher]
related_quotes: At the beginning I started behaving very bad, I did not do anything and did not respect you [the teacher/researcher].
